name: Microbial indoles
summary: Family of tryptophan-derived microbial metabolites, including indole and related AhR-linked signals, tested mainly in model-system healthspan experiments.
mechanism_summary: Signals from commensal tryptophan metabolism can engage host stress-response, barrier, inflammatory, and AhR-linked biology, but therapeutic translation remains mostly model-system or indirect diet/probiotic target engagement.

open_questions: Which specific indole metabolites are safe and beneficial under chronic dosing
Whether model-system healthspan effects translate to mammalian aging or human outcomes
How to separate direct metabolite replacement from live-microbe production strategies
